Trusted Boise Physical Therapy Experts

Expert Physical Therapy in Boise

Personalized care to help you move freely again. Our Boise clinic specializes in tailored recovery plans for active Idaho lifestyles.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Book an Appointment

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Mark R.

After tearing my ACL skiing at Bogus Basin, I thought my active lifestyle was over. The team at Apex created a progressive rehab plan that had me back on the trails within 6 months. Their knowledge of sports-specific movements made all the difference - they even analyzed my skiing form videos to prevent future injuries.

S
Sarah K.

Living with fibromyalgia made Boise's cold winters unbearable. My therapist taught me pacing strategies and designed an indoor exercise routine for days when the weather flares my symptoms. After 3 months, I've reduced my pain medication by half and can enjoy short walks along the Greenbelt again.

J
James and Linda T.

Our 4-year-old was behind on gross motor skills and hated traditional therapy. The team at Apex made sessions so fun with obstacle courses and games that he asks when he can go back. He's now keeping up with his friends at Camel's Back Park playground.

R
Roberta S.

Vertigo made me afraid to leave my house in winter. After just two visits including the Epley maneuver, my dizziness improved dramatically. They taught me simple exercises to do at home and gave great advice for navigating icy sidewalks safely. Life-changing care!

Apex Physical Therapy — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every physical therapy project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Physical Therapy Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific physical therapy needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team delivers your care with precision and attention to detail. We keep you informed and comfortable every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

We follow up to ensure your complete satisfaction and optimal results.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Boise & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Boise, ID and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Boise Meridian Nampa Eagle Caldwell Kuna Star Middleton
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our physical therapy services.

How soon after surgery should I start physical therapy?

We typically begin within 1-2 weeks post-op, depending on your surgeon's recommendations and healing progress. Early mobilization helps prevent stiffness and promotes circulation.

Will therapy be painful after my surgery?

We carefully monitor your pain levels and adjust treatments accordingly. Some discomfort is normal, but we use modalities like ice and electrical stimulation to manage post-surgical pain effectively.

How long will I need post-surgical rehab?

Most patients require 6-12 weeks of therapy, depending on the procedure and your individual recovery rate. We'll provide a clear timeline after your initial evaluation.

Built on Boise Values

Schedule a consultation to discuss how we can help you regain mobility and return to the activities you love.

Let's Begin →
